articles.description: Lando Norris, Luke Littler and the England women's football team are among the nominees for this year's Laureus World Sports Awards with the winners to be announced in April.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Broadcast Schedule: Record 70 Matches on FOX; 34 on FS1
articles.description: FOX Sports’ FIFA World Cup 2026 schedule is set to take over the summer airwaves with all 104 tournament matches airing live across FOX (70) and FS1 (34).
articles.content:
